message:
fix(mcp): fix mcp-client feature build — resolve mcp_proxy module path and suppress warning

mcp_bridge.rs referenced `mcp_proxy::compose_proxy_tools` without the
`super::` prefix required for sibling module access, causing E0433 when
building with mcp-client feature. Also suppressed migration-phase unused
import warning in mcp_proxy.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
